name: Stamford American International School (SAIS)
tagline: American curriculum school with state-of-the-art Woodleigh campus
description: Stamford American International School (SAIS) offers an American standards-based curriculum from 18 months through Grade 12, culminating in the IB Diploma or Advanced Placement (AP) courses. Its award-winning campus in Woodleigh, opened in 2018, features cutting-edge facilities including an innovation center, performing arts theatres, and two swimming pools. SAIS is part of the Cognita global schools group and serves over 2,700 students from 75+ nationalities.

faqs.question: What curriculum does Stamford offer?
faqs.answer: SAIS offers an American standards-based curriculum leading to AP courses and/or the IB Diploma in Grades 11-12. Students can choose either or both pathways.

faqs.question: Where is Stamford located?
faqs.answer: SAIS is on Woodleigh Lane, near Woodleigh MRT (North-East Line), in a purpose-built campus that opened in 2018.
